label: Security
items: Plant Doctor and Generate Guide edge functions now authenticate every request before reading server config. Closes an info-leak / auth-bypass corner that could surface on misconfigured deploys.

label: Onboarding & polish
items: Experienced gardener? The Welcome tour now has an "I'm experienced — skip the tour" express lane on the first slide. Sets your persona to experienced so future copy is terser, no more coach marks.
Today's Tasks empty state now nudges you toward setting up your first watering / pruning / harvesting schedule rather than just saying "No tasks!".
The Shed empty state has a clear "Add your first plant" CTA when your library is brand-new.
"Add to Shed" wording is now consistent across every entry point (search, Plant Doctor, Plan staging, shopping list, manual creation).
Frequency hint under the "Repeat every (days)" input now adapts to the task type — different ranges for watering vs pruning vs harvesting.
Yield Predictor shows a progress bar towards 3 logged harvests so you can see why early predictions feel fuzzy.
Desktop dashboard now surfaces a "Start a Garden Walk" card once you have 5+ plants — same morning ritual already on mobile.
Search shortcut chip now shows ⌘K on Mac, Ctrl+K on Windows / Linux.
